patch.value: True round-trip GitHub sync: search provider, validate diagnostics, safe-by-default export, fix activation

Deepen pm-github toward a true GitHub<->pm round-trip and fix a shipped activation-breaking bug.

CRITICAL BUG FOUND: published 2026.6.2 manifest capabilities omit 'preflight' but index.ts calls api.registerPreflight -> 'extension_activate_failed' -> the ENTIRE extension fails to activate (no import/export/sync/commands work). Must add 'preflight' to manifest.

Enhancements:
1. github validate diagnostics command: gh/token availability, repo accessibility, --json.
2. search provider (search capability): registers a 'github' provider that queries GitHub issues for --repo and maps matches back to local imported pm items (provider hits MUST reference local item ids; remote-only ids are dropped by runtime). Add 'search' to manifest ONLY if verified to activate + return hits.
3. Export safety: make export DEFAULT to dry-run (print would-create/update payloads); real writes only with --apply/--no-dry-run AND --repo; upsert existing GitHub issues by provenance.

Constraints: CommandError w/ numeric exitCode; --json via ctx.global.json (no own stdout in json mode); type-only SDK imports; backward compatible; real writes opt-in only.

Duplicate of pm-github-9dqy (a failed JSON-parse on the create response masked a successful create, so the feature was created twice). 9dqy is the canonical feature carrying all child tasks/decisions.
